wordplay_note: The fairy skeptic — magical and destructive
card_description: Fay Hume (meaning "Hume = David Hume (skeptic); Fay = fairy/fated") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Confessions of a Crap Artist*. Jack's manipulative sister whose affairs and schemes destroy those around her. Name note: The fairy skeptic — magical and destructive. The realistic novel's version of PKD's cosmic manipulator — a domestic demiurge. First appears in *Confessions of a Crap Artist*.

reference.brief: Jack's manipulative sister whose affairs and schemes destroy those around her
reference.significance: The realistic novel's version of PKD's cosmic manipulator — a domestic demiurge
